evals.prompt: Render evals/sample/deck-sample.md to the claudecode-deck template (the skill renders ONE template and ONE company per run).
evals.expected_output: Exactly one 16:9 PDF for the single selected template, with the hand-written raw SVG diagram embedded, no raw ```d2 text, brand styling applied, and the company selected from the profile shown in the footer.
assertions: exactly one PDF is produced (the skill renders a single template per run)
the PDF page size is 1440 x 810 pts (16:9)
the raw SVG diagram is embedded — confirm via its embedded <text> labels appearing in the PDF text layer (marp embeds SVG as VECTOR, not a raster image, so pdfimages will NOT list it)
no PDF text layer contains the literal '```d2' or 'direction: right'
the selected company name from the profile appears in the PDF footer

evals.prompt: Make a polished handbook PDF from evals/sample/handbook-sample.md.
evals.expected_output: A 6.5x9.25in LaTeX book PDF with a cover, dotted-leader Contents, chapter openers, callout cards, a pull quote, and the raw SVG diagram as a figure.
assertions: PDF page size is 468 x 666 pts (6.5x9.25in book trim)

the raw SVG figure is embedded — confirm via its caption / embedded text in the PDF text layer (the handbook converts SVG→PDF as a VECTOR figure, not a raster image, so pdfimages will NOT list it) — and no raw '```d2' leaks
a Contents page with dotted leaders is present

evals.prompt: Render evals/sample/corporate-deck-sample.md to the corporate-deck template (the skill renders ONE template and ONE company per run).
evals.expected_output: A corporate-deck slide PDF in the corporate-deck brand (navy/green/gold, serif Lora accents) with a cover, a big-stat, a KPI slide, the alur-operasional diagram on a split slide, and a closing.
assertions: PDF page size is 1440 x 810 pts

no raw d2 leaks (no '```d2' or 'direction:' in the PDF text); the alur-operasional diagram is embedded — confirm via its embedded <text> labels (e.g. 'SPPG') in the PDF text layer, since marp embeds SVG as VECTOR, not a raster image (pdfimages will NOT list it)

evals.prompt: Render evals/sample/deck-sample.md to the claudecode-deck template branded as 'Acme Labs' using evals/sample/profile-with-logo.yaml, so the footer shows the brand logo.
evals.expected_output: One 16:9 claudecode-deck PDF whose footer shows the Acme Labs logo image (a raster PNG) next to the company name.
assertions: the PDF page size is 1440 x 810 pts (16:9)
the footer logo rendered — pdfimages lists at least one raster image (the PNG logo embeds as a raster, unlike the vector SVG diagram), confirming the logo appears in the footer
the company name 'Acme Labs' appears in the PDF footer
